ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who created the resource */,
  "h5p_library_type" TEXT /* Type of H5P library used (e.g., Interactive Video) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License associated with the resource (e.g., CC BY-ND, U) */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the resource belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the resource was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., video, ebook) */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource is published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was last updated */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the resource */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL to the actual file of the resource */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the resource file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_license FOREIGN KEY ("license") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_h5p_library_type FOREIGN KEY ("h5p_library_type") REFERENCES h5p_libraries ("h5p_library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author's record was last updated */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the author */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subject was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the subject was last updated */,
  "parent_subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent subject (for hierarchical organization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license (e.g., CC BY-ND, U) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the license was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the license was last updated */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the full license text */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "h5p_libraries" (
  "h5p_library_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each H5P library */,
  "h5p_library_type" TEXT /* Type of H5P library (e.g., Interactive Video) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the H5P library */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the H5P library was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the H5P library was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the H5P library */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("h5p_library_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the resource */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the course belongs to */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was associated with the course */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource is required for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_courses_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, student, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's record was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the analytics belong to */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., views, downloads) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics event was last updated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytics event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_tags_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_subjects" (
  "course_subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course subject */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the subject belongs to */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  "is_core_subject" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the subject is a core requirement for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_subjects_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_subjects_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES resource_courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., instructor, student, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the history belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the history event was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_history_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
